PostToolUse.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|html)$'; then oxfmt --write "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

PreToolUse.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '(bun\.lock|package-lock\.json|yarn\.lock|pnpm-lock\.yaml)$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit lock files directly. Use bun install instead.' && exit 1; fi; exit 0
